"""AgentCube provider for AgentRuntime CR deployment."""

import logging
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional

try:
    from kubernetes import client, config
    from kubernetes.client.rest import ApiException
except ImportError:
    raise ImportError("kubernetes package required. Install with: pip install agentcube[k8s]")

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class AgentCubeProvider:
    """Provider for deploying agents as AgentRuntime CRs."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        namespace: str = "default",
        verbose: bool = False,
        kubeconfig: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> None:
        """Initialize AgentCube provider."""
        self.namespace = namespace
        self.verbose = verbose
        if verbose:
            logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG, format="%(levelname)s: %(message)s")

        try:
            if kubeconfig:
                config.load_kube_config(config_file=kubeconfig)
            else:
                config.load_incluster_config()
        except config.ConfigException:
            config.load_kube_config()

        self.api = client.CustomObjectsApi()

    def _ensure_namespace(self) -> None:
        """Ensure the namespace exists."""
        try:
            self.core_v1 = client.CoreV1Api()
            self.core_v1.read_namespace(self.namespace)
        except ApiException as e:
            if e.status == 404:
                namespace = client.V1Namespace(
                    metadata=client.V1ObjectMeta(name=self.namespace)
                )
                self.core_v1.create_namespace(body=namespace)
                logger.info(f"Created namespace: {self.namespace}")
            else:
                raise

    def _sanitize_name(self, name: str) -> str:
        """Sanitize name for Kubernetes."""
        import re

        name = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9-]", "-", name.lower())
        return re.sub(r"-+", "-", name).strip("-")

    def deploy_agent_runtime(
        self,
        agent_name: str,
        image_url: str,
        port: int,
        entrypoint: Optional[str] = None,
        env_vars: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
        workload_manager_url: Optional[str] = None,
        router_url: Optional[str] = None,
        readiness_probe_path: Optional[str] = None,
        readiness_probe_port: Optional[int] = None,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Deploy agent as AgentRuntime CR."""
        self._ensure_namespace()
        sanitized_name = self._sanitize_name(agent_name)

        env_list = [
            {"name": k, "value": v}
            for k, v in (env_vars or {}).items()
        ]

        if workload_manager_url:
            env_list.append({"name": "WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL", "value": workload_manager_url})

        if router_url:
            env_list.append({"name": "ROUTER_URL", "value": router_url})

        if entrypoint:
            command_parts = entrypoint.split()
            command = [command_parts[0]]
            args = command_parts[1:] if len(command_parts) > 1 else None
        else:
            command = None
            args = None

        agent_runtime = {
            "apiVersion": "runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1",
            "kind": "AgentRuntime",
            "metadata": {
                "name": sanitized_name,
                "namespace": self.namespace,
            },
            "spec": {
                "targetPort": [
                    {
                        "port": port,
                        "protocol": "HTTP",
                    }
                ],
                "podTemplate": {
                    "spec": {
                        "containers": [
                            {
                                "name": sanitized_name,
                                "image": image_url,
                                "command": command,
                                "args": args,
                                "env": env_list,
                                "ports": [
                                    {
                                        "containerPort": port,
                                        "protocol": "TCP",
                                    }
                                ],
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                },
                "sessionTimeout": "15m",
                "maxSessionDuration": "8h",
            },
        }

        try:
            self.api.create_namespaced_custom_object(
                group="runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh",
                version="v1alpha1",
                namespace=self.namespace,
                plural="agentruntimes",
                body=agent_runtime,
            )
            logger.info(f"Created AgentRuntime: {sanitized_name}")
        except ApiException as e:
            if e.status == 409:
                logger.info(f"AgentRuntime {sanitized_name} already exists, updating...")
                self.api.replace_namespaced_custom_object(
                    group="runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh",
                    version="v1alpha1",
                    name=sanitized_name,
                    namespace=self.namespace,
                    plural="agentruntimes",
                    body=agent_runtime,
                )
            else:
                raise

        return {
            "agent_name": agent_name,
            "sanitized_name": sanitized_name,
            "namespace": self.namespace,
            "image": image_url,
            "port": port,
            "status": "created",
        }

    def get_agent_runtime(self, name: str, namespace: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get AgentRuntime CR status."""
        try:
            resource = self.api.get_namespaced_custom_object(
                group="runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh",
                version="v1alpha1",
                namespace=namespace,
                plural="agentruntimes",
                name=name,
            )

            status_info = resource.get("status", {})
            return {
                "name": name,
                "namespace": namespace,
                "status": status_info.get("conditions", []),
                "agent_endpoint": status_info.get("agentEndpoint"),
            }
        except ApiException as e:
            if e.status == 404:
                return None
            raise
